name: TTEC Holdings, Inc.
summary: TTEC Holdings, Inc. is a customer experience technology and services company operating through two segments: TTEC Digital, which designs and implements cloud-based and AI-enabled customer experience technology solutions, and TTEC Engage, which provides customer care, acquisition, and retention services. The company serves approximately 150 clients in its Engage segment and partners with technology vendors for its Digital segment, with delivery operations spanning multiple geographies including significant presence outside the U.S.

products.name: TTEC Digital
products.description: Designs and implements cloud-based and AI-enabled customer experience technology solutions, partnering with technology vendors for CX platform deployments.

products.name: TTEC Engage
products.description: Provides outsourced customer care, acquisition, and retention services to approximately 150 clients across multiple industries.

partnerships.description: TTEC Digital relies on technology partners for product reliability and revenue generation in delivering CX platform solutions.
